vibe: Cinematic, futuristic, moody, expensive, luxury streetwear

layout_patterns.hero: Cinematic fullscreen (min-h-[100vh]) with abstract chrome background overlay or hyperreal close-up product image. Heavy use of negative space. Content anchored to bottom or dramatically centered.
layout_patterns.collections: Asymmetric bento grids ('Tetris Grid' mode). Mix col-span-8 and col-span-4 to create tension. Images should be massive.
layout_patterns.product_page: Immersive split-screen layout. Sticky product details on the right (or left), large fluid image gallery on the opposite side filling 100vh.
layout_patterns.dashboards: Minimalist 'Control Room' grid. Dense, functional, 1px borders, #111111 backgrounds.

surface_strategies.navigation: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/40 border-b border-white/10. Sticky z-50.
surface_strategies.cards: Flat solid graphite (#111111) with 1px border (#222222). Hover effect: subtle border brightness increase (to #444) and slight scale up.
surface_strategies.buttons: Magnetic interaction feel. Primary: Solid Chrome/White (#E5E5E5) with black text. Secondary: Transparent with 1px border (#222222) and #E5E5E5 text.

motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Lenis smooth scroll is MANDATORY for premium momentum feel.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images scale smoothly (1.05x) over 0.6s ease. Links have a 1px underline that reveals from left to right.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade to black and fade up content via Framer Motion.
motion_and_interactions.parallax: Subtle parallax on hero images and background chrome textures.

component_instructions.forms: Highly customized Shadcn inputs. Transparent backgrounds, 1px bottom border only (no full box border), focus state brightens the bottom border to #E5E5E5.
component_instructions.modals: Shadcn Dialog. Dark glassmorphism background. No visible close button (use text 'Close').
component_instructions.cart: Side drawer (Shadcn Sheet). Minimalist layout, large product images, bold totals.
component_instructions.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

images.description: Abstract shiny metal texture for hero sections
Black and white portrait of a man wearing grills
Teeth gems close up on smiling woman

media.guidelines: NEVER use placeholder images. Always use the provided urls or realistic UI styling.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build out the full frontend structure in React + Vite + Tailwind.
Implement Framer Motion for text reveals, parallax, and smooth route transitions.
Ensure the entire UI strictly follows the grayscale/chrome dark theme. Avoid ANY bright colors (except critical errors or subtle success).
Integrate Firebase for Auth and DB. Create schemas for users, products, orders, and custom quotes.
Set up Razorpay in test mode.
Develop Admin Dashboard and Customer Dashboard with a 'Control Room' dense aesthetic.
Use Phosphor icons or Lucide icons with thin weights for a sharp, premium look.
Currency must be hardcoded or formatted as Indian Rupees (INR) ₹ across the entire platform.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements as per the rules.
